header.class: bg-surface sticky top-0 z-[1000] border-b border-border backdrop-blur-md

div.class: flex justify-between items-center h-[60px] max-w-theme mx-auto px-5 md:px-8 lg:px-12 relative
hidden md:flex flex-grow justify-center max-w-md mx-8
flex items-center bg-card border border-border rounded-theme py-1.5 px-3 w-full text-muted hover:bg-card/50 transition-fast cursor-pointer select-none

span.class: text-[9px] bg-surface border border-border px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-muted font-mono ml-2

div.class: flex items-center gap-4 text-muted

button.class: md:hidden bg-transparent border-none text-muted hover:text-text cursor-pointer p-1.5 transition-fast flex items-center
button.title: Search

button.class: bg-transparent border-none text-muted hover:text-text cursor-pointer p-1.5 transition-fast flex items-center
button.title: Reader Settings

button.class: bg-transparent border-none text-muted hover:text-text cursor-pointer p-1.5 transition-fast flex items-center
button.title: Navigation Menu

div.class: fixed inset-0 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm z-[9999] flex justify-center pt-[15vh] px-4
w-full max-w-[550px] bg-card border border-border rounded-lg shadow-2xl flex flex-col h-[380px] overflow-hidden animate-[bookmarkFadeIn_0.2s_ease]
flex items-center border-b border-border px-4 py-3 gap-2.5

input.class: bg-transparent border-none outline-none text-sm text-text placeholder:text-muted w-full font-sans
input.placeholder: Type a novel title to search...

button.class: text-[10px] text-muted hover:text-text border border-border bg-surface px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded cursor-pointer transition-fast font-mono

div.class: flex-grow overflow-y-auto p-2 scrollbar-thin flex flex-col gap-1
text-[10px] font-bold text-muted uppercase tracking-wider px-3 py-2
flex flex-col gap-1
text-center text-muted text-xs py-4 font-sans
border-t border-border px-4 py-2 flex justify-between items-center text-[10px] text-muted bg-surface/50 font-sans
fixed inset-0 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm z-[9999] flex items-center justify-center px-4
w-full max-w-[420px] bg-card border border-border rounded-lg shadow-2xl p-5 flex flex-col gap-4 animate-[bookmarkFadeIn_0.2s_ease]
flex justify-between items-center border-b border-border pb-3

span.class: text-sm font-bold tracking-tight text-text flex items-center gap-2 font-sans

button.class: bg-transparent border-none text-muted hover:text-text cursor-pointer p-0.5 flex items-center

div.class: flex flex-col gap-4 text-xs font-sans text-text
flex flex-col gap-1.5
bg-surface border border-border rounded-theme py-2 px-3 text-text font-semibold text-center select-none
flex flex-col gap-1.5
flex gap-1

button.class: flex-grow bg-surface hover:bg-surface/80 border border-border hover:border-primary text-text py-1.5 px-2 rounded-theme cursor-pointer font-semibold transition-fast

flex gap-1

flex gap-1

div.class: flex justify-between items-center border-t border-border pt-3 mt-1

button.class: text-[10px] text-muted hover:text-primary font-semibold bg-transparent border-none cursor-pointer transition-fast font-sans
